---
name: New Language Support
about: Request or offer to add a new language
title: '[Language] Add support for ...'
labels: language, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Language
- **Language:**
- **ISO 639-1 Code:**
- **RTL:** Yes / No

## PII Types to Cover
List the common PII types for this language/country:

- [ ] National ID
- [ ] Phone numbers
- [ ] IBAN / Bank accounts
- [ ] Tax ID
- [ ] Passport
- [ ] Address format
- [ ] Date of birth format
- [ ] Other: ...

## Are You Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I can create the pattern file
- [ ] I can help test but not write patterns
- [ ] I'm requesting this for others to implement

## Reference
Links to official documentation about the ID/number formats (if available).
